name: Turmeric Curcumin + Piperine
summary: Curcumin plus piperine improves curcumin bioavailability and has moderate evidence for inflammation and osteoarthritis pain outcomes.
description: Enhanced-bioavailability curcumin formulation using piperine to increase absorption.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: known hypersensitivity to turmeric or curcumin or piperine
bile duct obstruction or gallstones due to strong gallbladder-stimulating effect
anticoagulant or antiplatelet medications such as warfarin or aspirin or clopidogrel due to bleeding risk
iron supplements or iron-deficiency anemia due to piperine interference with iron absorption
discontinue 1-2 weeks before scheduled surgery due to bleeding risk
